subject.description: Two focused marketing team members in casual work attire.
subject.action: One person is pointing at a laptop screen with a look of disbelief, while the other is rubbing their temples in frustration over the generic AI ad copy.

setting.location: A messy, lived-in office desk covered in unorganized papers and coffee cups.

composition.framing: Rule of thirds. MUST follow cropping rules: never cut in flesh, leave perfect headspace above both figures, full torsos visible.

camera_settings.depth_of_field: Medium depth of field, capturing the messy office environment clearly alongside the subjects.

lighting.type: Standard, slightly harsh office fluorescent light.
lighting.color_grading: Unedited, point-and-shoot camera flash style, raw documentary, zero cinematic color grading.

negative_prompt: Things that MUST NOT appear in the image: aesthetic styling, cinematic lighting, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, perfect desk, ugly fonts, cartoon, illustration, cut off head, cut flesh, strange framing.
